topic: A second toothbrush, damp and used, appears in my holder.
title: A Second Toothbrush Kept Appearing | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A second toothbrush, damp and clearly used, kept appearing in my holder.
scenes.image_prompt: Two toothbrushes in a ceramic holder, one extra and dripping, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I lived completely alone in a top floor studio.
scenes.image_prompt: A small studio bathroom with a single sink and mirror, frosted window, low gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One brush. One mug. That was always all I owned.
scenes.image_prompt: A lone toothbrush standing in a holder beside a single mug, tidy sink, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a stranger's toothbrush stood beside mine. Worn flat.
scenes.image_prompt: An unfamiliar frayed toothbrush leaning next to a newer one in a holder, cold light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw it away at once.
scenes.image_prompt: A toothbrush dropped into a small bathroom trash bin, dim light, shadows on the tile, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning it was back, damp again, bristles still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A damp worn toothbrush returned to a holder, water beading on the bristles, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked mine and hid the holder inside a drawer.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom drawer pulled open with a toothbrush holder tucked inside, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn the holder sat on the sink. Two brushes again.
scenes.image_prompt: A toothbrush holder back on the sink edge holding two brushes, an open drawer behind, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The stranger's brush grew more worn each passing day.
scenes.image_prompt: A heavily frayed splayed toothbrush beside a normal one in a holder, harsh dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night I heard brushing from the dark bathroom.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark bathroom doorway with faint light on a sink, a toothbrush holder just visible, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved apartments and took only my own brush.
scenes.image_prompt: A packed box on a bare bathroom floor, an empty toothbrush holder on the sink, gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the new flat, two brushes waited the very first morning.
scenes.image_prompt: Two toothbrushes in a holder in an unfamiliar clean bathroom, one already damp, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
